response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified talk segment (00:00-02:49) and performance segment (02:49-05:00). 2. Identified song title 'ZIG-ZAG' for the performance segment based on on-screen text. 3. Identified performer as Takane Lui. 4. Conducted searches for lyrics and confirmed 'ZIG-ZAG' is an original song by Takane Lui. 5. Transcribed lyrics from the video as the search results did not provide full, verified official lyrics. 6. Constructed the final JSON response with scenes and metadata.
response.global_summary: The video features a talk segment between VTubers Takane Lui and Nekomata Okayu, followed by a vocal performance of the song 'ZIG-ZAG' by Takane Lui.

scenes.description: Talk and introduction segment between Takane Lui and Nekomata Okayu.
Takane Lui performs her original song 'ZIG-ZAG'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
シャウセンで囁いた　問いが　ラッタ　タラッタ
こびり憑いて　離れんわ　駄目だ　ラッタ　タラッタ
むずむず中の　生活像が　思いつかないや
忘れたいから　歌った　馬鹿だ　ラッタ　タラッタ
恨むことも　憎むことも
賢くない　故　出来なかった
これがキミの　結末ならば
笑って　しまいたい
ほど　うそ　うそ　うそ
やだ　だいだいだいだいな　奇跡
とか　ちょっと　覗んちゃって
もう　いやいやいやいやな　立ち位置が
わん　ずいいわん　絶え　らいらいらいな
お菓子　とこ　全部　えぐりとって
白昼夜で　結婚すきに　呼んでいいよ
トラウマに倍々ました　いのてす
です　ててててて
